creator: tps@vr-web.de
text:
/bin/sh /usr/ports/graphics/jpeg/work/jpeg-8b/install-sh -d /usr/local/include
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 jconfig.h /usr/local/include/jconfig.h
test -z "/usr/local/include" || ./install-sh -c -d "/usr/local/include"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 jerror.h jmorecfg.h jpeglib.h '/usr/local/include'
test -z "/usr/local/man/man1" || ./install-sh -c -d "/usr/local/man/man1"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 cjpeg.1 djpeg.1 jpegtran.1 rdjpgcom.1 wrjpgcom.1 '/usr/local/man/man1'
install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 555 /usr/ports/graphics/jpeg/work/jpeg-8b/jpegexiforient /usr/local/bin/
install  -o root -g wheel -m 555 /usr/ports/graphics/jpeg/work/jpeg-8b/exifautotran /usr/local/bin/
